title: thymus serpyllum var. lanuginosus
intro: Thymus serpyllum var. lanuginosus, also known as Woolly Thyme or Woolly Wild Thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus serpyllum plant, a low-growing, spreading evergreen herb native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Thymus serpyllum var. lanuginosus lie in its essential oil, which contains thymol and other compounds with antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Thymus serpyllum var. lanuginosus can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, as well as being added to skincare products due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
